raw.raw:
skill: remote-delegate
catalog:
  kind: skill
  audience: operator
runners:
  remote:
    source:
      type: a2a
      agent_card_url: https://agents.example/card.json
      agent_identity: agent:remote
      task: delegate
      arguments:
        mode: audit
    inputs:
      prompt:
        required: true

input.yaml:
skill: remote-delegate
catalog:
  kind: skill
  audience: operator
runners:
  remote:
    source:
      type: a2a
      agent_card_url: https://agents.example/card.json
      agent_identity: agent:remote
      task: delegate
      arguments:
        mode: audit
    inputs:
      prompt:
        required: true
